Readout: Prime Minister's roundtable with business leaders

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

for forwarding as PM readouts usually go to a set list, but this feels useful to share

more broadly.

Prime Minister’_s roundtable with business leaders, Thursday 3 April

The Prime Minister met with business leaders from: Astra Zeneca, BA, AB Foods,
Unilever, Airbus, Shell, Johnson Matthey, GSK, Deloitte, LSEG, Rigby Group,
Barclays, Diageo, the National Grid, JLR and Google on 3 April,

485

eee

Ailsa Terry CMG| Private Secretary for Foreign Affairs| Prime Minister's Office |
10 Downing Street, London, SW1A 2AA | T: Personal

486

Subject: RE: Next steps further
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
Of course – they will go no further than the FS.
Caroline Hurndall │PPS/FS │ 
The Foreign Secretary’s box deadline is midday, Monday to Thursday. Please allow a minimum 
of 48hrs to process work sent to FSPO. Please also copy
to all
